name: Basic setup request does not include TurboSnap or advanced flags
query: Set up Chromatic in our CI.
context: The project uses GitLab CI (.gitlab-ci.yml exists). The user has not mentioned TurboSnap, Playwright, Cypress, or monorepos.
expected_behavior: Generates a minimal Chromatic job with GIT_DEPTH: 0 and npx chromatic
Does not add --only-changed, --playwright, --cypress, or workingDir flags
Includes CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN from a CI/CD variable
success_criteria: The generated config does not include --only-changed or TurboSnap references
The generated config does not include --playwright or --cypress
